01about

Engineer Profile

MIT Manipal · Mechatronics · Class of 2026

Ishan Deshmukh
mechatronics-engineer
robotics embedded PCB

I chose Mechatronics because I wanted to build things that move and react — and that instinct hasn't changed in four years. The path has been messier than planned, and I've learned more from failures than wins.

Deep in electronics and embedded systems — STM32 microcontrollers, custom PCBs for national competition robots, sensor fusion pipelines from scratch, and a 3D-printed walking quadruped.

Competed nationally at DD Robocon, placed AIR 22, missed the ABU top-12 cutoff by 10 ranks. Currently interning at Cosy Farms in Mumbai. Learning German — because the engineering world I want to live in speaks it.

competition
DD Robocon 2025 (Vietnam Rice Theme). Vision-guided arm, omnidirectional drive, custom PCBs, depth camera integration.

robocon-r2-drum
competition
